summary: Frontend-only testing of RFQ approval flow completed successfully. All 7 test scenarios passed: Admin login, navigation to Pending RFQ tab, RFQ display verification, clicking Approve & Generate Quote button, success popup verification with 'Approved & Submitted!' message, RFQ moving to Approved tab, and approved quote appearing in Approved tab.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing RFQs in the system
context_for_next_testing_agent: RFQ approval flow is fully functional. The admin can approve RFQs from the Pending RFQ tab. On approval: (1) Success popup shows 'Approved & Submitted!' with new quote number, (2) RFQ is converted to Quote (e.g., RFQ/25-26/0031 becomes Q/25-26/0032), (3) Pending RFQ count decreases, (4) Quote appears in Approved tab with 'Approved' badge. 19 pending RFQs remain in the system for future testing.

test_2_navigate_pending_rfq.details: Successfully navigated to Quotes tab and clicked Pending RFQ tab

test_3_rfq_displayed.details: Multiple RFQs visible with Approve & Generate Quote buttons

test_4_click_approve_button.details: Successfully clicked Approve & Generate Quote button on RFQ/25-26/0031

test_5_success_popup.details: Success popup appeared with 'Approved & Submitted!' message, green checkmark, new quote number Q/25-26/0032, and View Approved Quotes button

test_6_rfq_moves_to_approved.details: Pending RFQ count decreased from 20 to 19

test_7_quote_in_approved_tab.details: Quote Q/25-26/0032 visible in Approved tab with Approved badge

verified_features: RFQ list display with Approve & Generate Quote buttons
RFQ approval action triggers success popup
Success popup displays new quote number
RFQ removed from Pending RFQ tab after approval
Approved quote appears in Approved tab
